---
title: "Open Source Projects"
pagetitle: "Projects | Anthony Faustine"
description-meta: "Open-source ML libraries for forecasting, load monitoring, and production machine learning systems."

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    body-class: "projects-page"

toc: false
---

<div class="projects-header">

## Open Source Projects

Production-grade ML libraries from research to enterprise

</div>

<div class="projects-timeline">

```{r projects-timeline, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
library(yaml)
projects_data <- yaml::read_yaml("data.yml")

for (proj in projects_data$projects) {
  status_class <- tolower(proj$status)
  icon <- switch(proj$status,
    "Active" = "rocket",
    "Maintained" = "gear",
    "Community" = "people",
    "star"
  )

  status_label <- switch(proj$status,
    "Active" = "🚀 Active",
    "Maintained" = "⚙️ Maintained",
    "Community" = "👥 Community",
    "Active"
  )

  cat(sprintf('<div class="timeline-event status-%s">\n', status_class))
  cat(sprintf('  <div class="timeline-icon"><i class="bi bi-%s"></i></div>\n', icon))
  cat('  <div class="timeline-content">\n')
  cat(sprintf('    <div class="timeline-year">%d</div>\n', proj$year))
  cat(sprintf('    <h3 class="timeline-title">%s</h3>\n', proj$name))
  cat('    <div class="timeline-meta">\n')
  cat(sprintf('      <span class="timeline-status">%s</span>\n', status_label))
  cat(sprintf('      <span>Updated: %s</span>\n', proj$updated))
  cat('    </div>\n')
  cat(sprintf('    <p class="timeline-description">%s</p>\n', proj$description))

  cat('    <div class="timeline-links">\n')
  for (link in proj$links) {
    cat(sprintf('      <a href="%s" class="timeline-link" title="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-%s"></i>%s</a>\n',
                link$url, link$label, link$icon, link$label))
  }

  if (!is.null(proj$paper)) {
    cat(sprintf('      <a href="%s" class="timeline-link" title="View Paper" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i>Paper</a>\n',
                proj$paper$url))
  }

  cat('    </div>\n')
  cat('  </div>\n')
  cat('</div>\n\n')
}
```

</div>

---

## Contributing

These projects welcome contributions and collaboration.

[Open an Issue](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm} [Submit a PR](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
